data.title: ZEROBASE (ZBT) will soon be listed on the Bybit spot platform
data.description: According to the official announcement, Bybit will list ZEROBASE (ZBT) on the spot market at 1 PM UTC on October 17th. A Token Splash of 5,000,000 ZBT and a Launchpool of 4,000,000 ZBT will be available for new and existing users to share. Users can earn rewards through staking, depositing, and trading. - Deposits open: October 17th, 4:00 AM (UTC) - Trading open: October 17th, 1:00 PM (UTC) - Withdrawals open: October 18th, 10:00 AM (UTC) ZEROBASE is a decentralized cryptographic infrastructure network that leverages zero-knowledge proofs (ZKPs) and trusted execution environments (TEEs) to enable verifiable off-chain computations. The network powers products like zkStaking, zkLogin, and ProofYield, bridging institutional-grade DeFi, user privacy, and real-world asset (RWA) strategies. ZEROBASE implements a programmable, compliance-aligned staking mechanism, providing trust through transparent cryptographic verification while protecting sensitive data from exposure.

data.title: China-France eye tighter ties on AI and global issues
data.description:
China and France held their 27th strategic dialogue in Hangzhou to strengthen political trust and expand cooperation.
source: https://www.cryptopolitan.com/china-france-eye-tighter-ties-on-ai/

data.title: Ethereum spot ETFs saw a total net inflow of $170 million yesterday, with only the 21Shares ETF TETH experiencing a net outflow
data.description: According to SoSoValue data, Ethereum spot ETFs saw a total net inflow of $170 million yesterday (October 15th, EST). The Blackrock ETF ETHA saw the largest daily net inflow, with $164 million, bringing ETHA's total net inflow to $14.342 billion. The next largest daily net inflow was the Bitwise ETF ETHW, with $12.3065 million, bringing ETHW's total net inflow to $453 million. The 21 Shares ETF TETH saw the largest daily net outflow, with $7.9783 million, bringing TETH's total net inflow to $21.400 million. As of press time, the total net asset value of the Ethereum spot ETF was US$27.369 billion, the ETF net asset ratio (market value as a percentage of Ethereum's total market value) reached 5.72%, and the historical cumulative net inflow has reached US$14.886 billion.

data.title: Binance Wallet Astra Nova pre-sale exceeds 520 times of fundraising
data.description: According to official data, the presale of Binance Wallet's Astra Nova token (RVV) has exceeded its target by 520 times. The presale targeted 172.1 BNB, with 90,612 BNB already pledged.

data.title: Bitcoin spot ETFs saw a total net outflow of $104 million yesterday, with none of the twelve ETFs experiencing a net inflow.
data.description: According to SoSoValue data, Bitcoin spot ETFs saw a total net outflow of $104 million yesterday (October 15th, EST). The Grayscale GBTC ETF saw the largest daily net outflow, with $82.9036 million, bringing GBTC's total net outflow to $24.429 billion. The next largest outflow was the Invesco and Galaxy Digital ETF, BTCO, with a daily net outflow of $11.0986 million, bringing BTCO's total net inflow to $193 million. As of press time, the total net asset value of Bitcoin spot ETFs stood at $151.32 billion, with a net asset value ratio (market capitalization relative to the total Bitcoin market capitalization) of 6.83%, and cumulative net inflows reaching $62.442 billion.

data.title: In the past hour, the entire network has liquidated $113 million, mainly due to long orders.
data.description: Coinglass data shows that in the past hour, the entire network had a liquidation of US$113 million, with long positions liquidating US$105 million and short positions liquidating US$8.3593 million.

data.title: Binance Alpha to List ANOME (ANOME) and SubHub (SUBHUB)
data.description: Binance Alpha will list the following projects: ANOME (ANOME) airdrop on October 17th and SubHub (SUBHUB) airdrop on October 17th. Eligible users can claim these airdrops using Binance Alpha Points on the Alpha event page after Alpha trading opens. Detailed details will be announced separately.

data.title: Mysterious Whale Shifts Strategy to Long Bitcoin Positions
data.description: According to PANews, a notable shift in Bitcoin trading strategy has been observed by on-chain analyst @ai_9684xtpa. A mysterious whale, who previously held a $140 million short position on Bitcoin, has reversed their stance and initiated a long position. The trader has recently opened a 5x leveraged long position, currently holding 68.42 BTC valued at approximately $7.62 million, with an entry price of $111,066.5. Additionally, the whale has placed a limit buy order worth $14.65 million in the price range of $111,000 to $111,053.

data.title: ZBT will be listed on Bitget PoolX soon, locking up ETH to unlock 1.2 million ZBT
data.description: Bitget PoolX is about to launch the ZBT project, with a total prize pool of 1,200,000 ZBT. The staking channel will be open from 21:00 on October 17th to 21:00 on October 22nd (UTC+8). Details are as follows: ETH staking pool: Total airdrop: 1,200,000 ZBT. Individual staking limit: 500 ETH. In addition, users who subscribe to ETH products during the event and have a positive net deposit will receive a 10% ETH investment coupon after the PoolX event ends.

data.title: Solana price forecast: SOL risks bearish flip amid 6% dip
data.description:
Solana (SOL) has dropped by more than 6% in the past 24 hours. The altcoin has broken below $200 as macroeconomic headwinds intensify. This brings the losses for the week to 13%, with Solana now poised near support at $190

data.title: A whale lost over $1 million in one day and re-deposited 5.01 million ASTER tokens into Binance
data.description: According to Onchain Lens monitoring, a whale (0 x 832329 a 4 Cca 6 f 5897 eeEF 925 F 9 a 460 f 2 bf 463 d 8 E) redeposited 5.01 million ASTER (worth $6.61 million) to Binance. The address lost more than $1 million due to holding it for one day.
